prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年河海大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约12316名、12334名、11658名、13610名、13650名。2021–2023年位次在11658–12334之间窄幅波动，2 024年大幅后移至13610名（较2023年后移约1952名），2025年基本持平于13650名。近两年位次明显后移，2025年基准约13650名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划 2021年31人、2022年35人、2023年36人、2024年46人、2025年47人，呈持续扩招趋势。2026年计划49人，较2025年增加2人（+4.26%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解，但 扩招幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河海大学为211工程、国家双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第60–65名区间（2026年约第63名），属中上水平211，水利工程为全 国顶尖（A+），整体办学实力和声誉良好；该校近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第52位（较热），综合热度约62.6万，短视频 平台曝光度处于中等偏上水平，反映报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中，水利工程获评A+（全国顶尖），土木工程A，环境科学与工程A。水利类（大禹强化班 /直升班）为该校王牌专业，对高分考生有较强吸引力；环境工程、给排水等专业依托A级学科也有一定竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信 息/通信等专业社会热度持续偏高（高热推荐），河海大学相关专业（计算机类大禹班、电气工程等）受益于此。水利工程属传统工科，整体热度一般。北京市2026年高考报名总 人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（+29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧。；河海大学位于江苏南 京，属外省高校。北京考生对京外高校的报考意愿受地域偏好影响，但河海大学作为知名211，在北京市有一定认可度。该校2026年在京招生计划49人，占其全国总计划比例较小 ，属正常外省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年明显后移（2024–2025年稳定在13600名附近）、2026年招生计划小幅扩招（+4.26%）、北京市考生总数大幅增长（ +29.7%）以及学校声誉平稳等因素，2026年竞争预计进一步加剧，位次将继续小幅后移。预测最低位次约14049名，区间13549–14549名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14049名，区间13549–14549名。位次在区间下限（13500名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类大禹班、会计学培优班、法学、水利类大禹班）；位次在区间中 段（约14000名）建议以二档为主（水利水电工程、电气工程、大数据管理、计算机科学与技术等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（14500名附近）建议以三档保底为主，同时 可争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。水利工程A+学科相关专业（水利水电、水文水资源、水务工程）为该校特色优势，就业方向明确，值得重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Hohai University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 12,316, 12,334, 11,658, 13,610, and 13,650 respectively. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 11,658 and 12,334 from 2021 to 2023, then significantly shifted backward to 13,610 in 2024 (a backward shift of about 1,952 compared to 2023), and remained roughly stable at 13,650 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings have notably moved backward, with a baseline of about 13,650 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Beijing's comprehensive category was 31 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 47 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 49, an increase of 2 (+4.26%) from 2025, slightly alleviating competition but with limited expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hohai University is a 211 Project and national Double First-Class university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has been stable in the 60–65 range in recent years (approximately 63rd in 2026), placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its water conservancy engineering is nationally top-tier (A+), and overall academic strength and reputation are good. The university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of admission gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 52nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 626,000, indicating moderate to high exposure on short video platforms and reflecting decent application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, water conservancy engineering was rated A+ (national top), civil engineering A, and environmental science and engineering A. The water conservancy category (Dayu Strengthening Class/Direct Admission Class) is the university's flagship program, strongly attracting high-scoring students. Environmental engineering, water supply and drainage, and other majors also have certain competitiveness due to their A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electrical engineering and automation, and electronic information/communication continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended), and Hohai University's related majors (computer science Dayu class, electrical engineering, etc.) benefit from this. Water conservancy engineering is a traditional engineering field with generally average popularity. The total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants in 2026 is approximately 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (+29.7%) from 65,434 in 2025, representing a significant increase in the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Hohai University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, and is an out-of-province university. Beijing candidates' willingness to apply to out-of-province universities is influenced by regional preferences, but Hohai University, as a well-known 211, has a certain degree of recognition in Beijing. Its 2026 enrollment plan in Beijing is 49, accounting for a small proportion of its national total, which is a normal scale for out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in historical rankings over the past two years (stabilizing around 13,600 in 2024–2025), the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+4.26%), the substantial increase in the total number of Beijing candidates (+29.7%), and the stable university reputation, competition is expected to further intensify in 2026, with rankings continuing to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14,049, with a range of 13,549–14,549.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14,049, range 13,549–14,549. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 13,500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science Dayu Class, Accounting Excellence Class, Law, Water Conservancy Dayu Class); candidates in the middle of the range (around 14,000) are advised to primarily target Tier 2 majors (Water Resources and Hydroelectric Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Big Data Management, Computer Science and Technology, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 sprints; candidates at the upper end of the range (near 14,500) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 as safety options, while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements. Majors related to the A+ discipline of water conservancy engineering (Water Resources and Hydroelectric Engineering, Hydrology and Water Resources, Water Engineering) are the university's distinctive strengths with clear career paths and deserve focused attention.
